name: Belphegor, the Crawling Sin
description: 'This' is merely 'filth that must be cleared.'
postTalk: An unpleasant noise, like the screams of dozens blending into one, echoes from beyond the corridor.
Crawling out to fill the entire wall is a massive mass of flesh, its limbs tangled and fused together.
Belphegor: 'Don't... want to die... It's hot... Get me... out...'
Countless eyes fixate on you all at once, and the mass of flesh begins to writhe violently.
defeatTalk: Belphegor: 'You.. too.. won't be.. any.. diff..erent.. You shall.. rot.. away.. with.. us..'
The massive lumps of flesh unravel helplessly, scattering across the floor as a black liquid.
In the spot where the stench has faded, you find a 'Terminal Map' lying on the ground.

You have overcome the first trial and obtained the [Map] of the terminal.
The Map command is now active.
